blurb.hr: Global Premium Cigars Enriquea Sáncheza; ime nosi po godini 1502., kada je Kolumbo pristao uz obalu Nikaragve. Nikaragvanski puro blendovi (Emerald, Ruby, Black Gold, XO) prepoznatljivi po box-pressu i zatvorenoj nozi koja čuva arome.

blurb.en: Alonso Menendez — Brazilian puro by Menendez Amerino (Benji/Felix); the company’s first brand, named for father Alonso.

blurb.hr: Američki brend koji izrađuje Fuente — od kremaste Classic Connecticut do snažne VSG.

blurb.hr: Casa Royale — Holt's/katalog value linija (Churchill/Robusto); pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Casa Royale — Holt's/catalogue value line (Churchill/Robusto); reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: Obitelj Turrent uzgaja duhan u meksičkoj dolini San Andrés od 1880.; Casa Turrent premium linije vodi Alejandro Turrent u tvornici Nueva Matacapan.
blurb.en: The Turrent family has grown tobacco in Mexico’s San Andrés Valley since 1880; Alejandro Turrent leads Casa Turrent premium lines at Nueva Matacapan.

blurb.hr: Casagranda Cigars — uvoz/boutique Wernera Casagrande (Stuttgart), tvrtka od 2013.; Overrun Nicaragua H-2000 i Limitada s Kurtom Brandtom.
blurb.en: Casagranda Cigars — import/boutique of Werner Casagranda (Stuttgart), company since 2013; Overrun Nicaragua H-2000 and Limitada with Kurt Brandt.

blurb.hr: Casdagli Cigars (prvobitno Bespoke Cigars) osnovao je Jeremy Casdagli 1997.; boutique marka s proizvodnjom u Dominikanskoj Republici i Kostariki.
blurb.en: Casdagli Cigars (originally Bespoke Cigars) was founded by Jeremy Casdagli in 1997; a boutique brand made in the Dominican Republic and Costa Rica.

blurb.hr: Castano — proprietary Holt’s/Ashton Brands linija (Honduras); uvedena u srpnju 1997. (SEC filing Holt’s Cigar Holdings).
blurb.en: Castano — proprietary Holt’s/Ashton Brands line (Honduras); introduced July 1997 (Holt’s Cigar Holdings SEC filing).

blurb.hr: Castillo de Reyes — boutique Felixa Reyesa (Santiago, DR); Blue 3F / Red El Mejor Sabor uvedeni 16.9.2025. (Cigarworld).
blurb.en: Castillo de Reyes — Felix Reyes boutique (Santiago, DR); Blue 3F / Red El Mejor Sabor introduced 16 Sep 2025 (Cigarworld).

blurb.hr: Cavalier Genève osnovao je Sébastien Decoppet krajem 2015. u Ženevi; cigare se proizvode u Hondurasu.
blurb.en: Cavalier Genève was founded by Sébastien Decoppet in late 2015 in Geneva; the cigars are made in Honduras.

blurb.hr: Centaur Cigars Hero Series Tobiasa Forsta; mitološki blendovi u Toro formatu, Kelner Boutique Factory (DR).
blurb.en: Centaur Cigars Hero Series by Tobias Forst; mythology-inspired Toro blends at Kelner Boutique Factory (DR).

blurb.hr: Charatan Claro/Colorado/Maduro — Tor Imports InterTabac 2024 relaunch; Dunhill Charatan cigare UK od ranih 1990-ih (pipe brand 1863.).
blurb.en: Charatan Claro/Colorado/Maduro — Tor Imports InterTabac 2024 relaunch; Dunhill Charatan cigars UK from early 1990s (pipe brand 1863).

blurb.hr: Charter Oak — Foundation Cigar Co. value linija (CT Shade/Broadleaf); lansirana IPCPR 2016. kao hommage Connecticutu.
blurb.en: Charter Oak — Foundation Cigar Co. value line (CT Shade/Broadleaf); launched IPCPR 2016 as homage to Connecticut.

blurb.hr: Chateau Diadem — Emily Sahakian i Thierry Farah (Ženeva) od 2020.; debut linija Conviction iz Dominikanske Republike (vlastita manufaktura).
blurb.en: Chateau Diadem — Emily Sahakian and Thierry Farah (Geneva) from 2020; debut Conviction line from the Dominican Republic (own workshop).

blurb.hr: Nikaragvanska marka Johna Athertona (Horizon Cigars) za europsko tržište; Classic, Torcidos i dr.
blurb.en: Nicaraguan brand by John Atherton (Horizon Cigars) for the European market; Classic, Torcidos, and others.

blurb.hr: Chone — Annis Arahma (Indonezija); luxusni longfilleri (Maduro 8 itd.) nakon što je 2016. počela razvijati lokalne blendove.
blurb.en: Chone — Annis Arahma (Indonesia); luxury long-fillers (Maduro 8 etc.) after she began developing local blends in 2016.

blurb.hr: Christo je 2004. oživio Diakoniestiftung Christopherushof u Bad Lobensteinu (nasljednik lokalne proizvodnje od 1886.); prodaja od 2005.
blurb.en: Christo was revived in 2004 by Diakoniestiftung Christopherushof in Bad Lobenstein (successor to local production dating to 1886); sold from 2005.

blurb.hr: Cibao — José „Jochy“ Blanco / Tabacalera Palma; marka od 1985. (Cibao Valley tobacco), kasniji US relaunch.
blurb.en: Cibao — José “Jochy” Blanco / Tabacalera Palma; brand from 1985 (Cibao Valley tobacco), later U.S. relaunch.

blurb.hr: CigarKings GmbH (München, Philipp Kugler) od 1.12.2016.; nikaragvanski entubado, COY linije.
blurb.en: CigarKings GmbH (Munich, Philipp Kugler) from 1 Dec 2016; Nicaraguan entubado, COY lines.

blurb.hr: Cigarworld kućni label — Corona de Luxe (Kleinlagel; prodaja od ~2008., katalog 2010.) i Ligero Estelí/Condega/Jalapa (PRODAP, 6. 6. 2024.); privatni label bez jedinstvene godine osnutka.
blurb.en: Cigarworld house label — Corona de Luxe (Kleinlagel; sold from ~2008, catalogued 2010) and Ligero Estelí/Condega/Jalapa (PRODAP, 6 Jun 2024); private label without a single founding year.

blurb.hr: CLE Cigar Co. (inicijali Christian Luis Eiroa) osnovan je 2012. nakon Eiroina odlaska iz Camacha; honduraška kuća s tvornicom El Aladino.
blurb.en: CLE Cigar Co. (Christian Luis Eiroa’s initials) was founded in 2012 after Eiroa left Camacho; a Honduran house with the El Aladino factory.

blurb.hr: Najprestižnija kubanska marka, izvorno stvorena za Fidela Castra i diplomatske darove. Duhan iz odabranih vega El Laguito prolazi dodatnu treću fermentaciju, po čemu je Cohiba prepoznatljiva po kremastoj, travnato-medenoj finoći.
blurb.en: Cuba's most prestigious marca, originally made for Fidel Castro and as diplomatic gifts. Tobacco from select El Laguito fields undergoes a third fermentation, giving Cohiba its creamy, grassy-honeyed refinement.

blurb.hr: Colón Vintage 2001 — panamska limited serija (Darier & Cleef), uvedena 16. 11. 2007.; tabaci berbe 2001.
blurb.en: Colón Vintage 2001 — Panamanian limited series (Darier & Cleef), introduced 16 Nov 2007; 2001-crop tobaccos.

blurb.hr: Condega — Nicaraguan marka (dolina Condega) Eduarda Fernándeza / Aganorsa u suradnji s Gesintom; pokrenuta 2002. kao value puro.
blurb.en: Condega — Nicaraguan brand (Condega Valley) from Eduardo Fernández / Aganorsa with Gesinta; launched 2002 as a value puro.

blurb.hr: Confidenciaal — Eric Piras (Cigraal / Bertie, Hong Kong); soft launch veljača 2022., trade launch InterTabac rujan 2022.
blurb.en: Confidenciaal — Eric Piras (Cigraal / Bertie, Hong Kong); soft launch February 2022, trade launch InterTabac September 2022.

blurb.hr: Cornelius & Anthony — Steven Bailey / S&M Brands; prve premium linije (Cornelius, Daddy Mac) 2016.
blurb.en: Cornelius & Anthony — Steven Bailey / S&M Brands; first premium lines (Cornelius, Daddy Mac) 2016.

blurb.hr: Villiger Corrida — europske linije po zemljama (DR/Honduras 2017., Brazil/Nikaragva 2018.).
blurb.en: Villiger Corrida — country-coded European lines (DR/Honduras 2017, Brazil/Nicaragua 2018).

blurb.hr: Cortesia — vlasnički brand Holt's Cigar Holdings (SEC 1998/99 uz Ashton/Castano/Savoy; katalog/retail, niže cijene); točna godina uvođenja linije nije navedena (za razliku od Castano July 1997/98).
blurb.en: Cortesia — proprietary brand of Holt's Cigar Holdings (SEC 1998/99 with Ashton/Castano/Savoy; catalog/retail, lower price tier); exact line introduction year not stated (unlike Castano July 1997/98).

blurb.hr: Boutique kuća iz Nashvillea (Jon Huber) koja radi s najboljim fabrikama (My Father, Tabacalera Pichardo). Le Carême, Four Kicks i Mil Días — moderni klasici s pričom.
blurb.en: A Nashville boutique house (Jon Huber) working with top factories (My Father, Tabacalera Pichardo). Le Carême, Four Kicks and Mil Días — modern classics with a story.

blurb.hr: CSC / Cigar Seed Company (Laith Haddad LA / Michael Sprick DE) — Fire Oak serija uvedena 11. 7. 2023.; Apache, Doble Capa i srodne nikaragvanske small-batch linije.
blurb.en: CSC / Cigar Seed Company (Laith Haddad LA / Michael Sprick DE) — Fire Oak series introduced 11 Jul 2023; Apache, Doble Capa and related Nicaraguan small-batch lines.

blurb.hr: Jedina marka s isključivo perfecto (dvostruko šiljastim) oblicima — medeno-drveni kuriozitet.
blurb.en: The only marca made entirely in perfecto (double-tapered) shapes — a honey-woody curiosity.

blurb.hr: Rolando Reyes Sr. — Havana 1955., kasnije Honduras; Limitado Zeppelin; danas pod Olivom.
blurb.en: Rolando Reyes Sr. — Havana 1955, later Honduras; Limitado Zeppelin; now under Oliva.

blurb.hr: Cuervo y Sobrinos Historiador — premium linija satnog brenda (Havana 1882) lansirana 2023.; ručno radene u Estelíju (Cigar Conexion / Tabacalera Pages, Nikaragva).
blurb.en: Cuervo y Sobrinos Historiador — premium cigar line of the watch maison (Havana 1882) launched in 2023; hand-made in Estelí (Cigar Conexion / Tabacalera Pages, Nicaragua).

blurb.hr: Cuesta-Rey (La flor de Cuesta-Rey) — Angel LaMadrid Cuesta i Peregrino Rey, Tampa/Ybor City od 1884.; od 1958. J.C. Newman, danas Fuente DR.
blurb.en: Cuesta-Rey (La flor de Cuesta-Rey) — Angel LaMadrid Cuesta and Peregrino Rey, Tampa/Ybor City from 1884; J.C. Newman since 1958, now Fuente DR.

blurb.hr: Culture je private-label marka uvoznika Paula Buggea; Dominican Reserve serija u katalogima se bilježi od 2009., uz kasnije nikaragvanske Aniversario linije.
blurb.en: Culture is a Paul Bugge private-label brand; the Dominican Reserve series is catalogued from 2009, with later Nicaraguan Aniversario lines.

blurb.hr: Nikaragvanski brend Maye Selve, sestrinski Flor de Selvi — tamniji i zemljaniji izraz kuće, iz doline Jalape.
blurb.en: Maya Selva's Nicaraguan brand, sister to Flor de Selva — the house's darker, earthier expression from the Jalapa valley.

blurb.hr: Osnovala su ga braća Chase; danas dio Davidoff grupe. Blagi do srednji dominikanski profili izvrsnog omjera cijene i kvalitete.
blurb.en: Founded by the Chase brothers; today part of the Davidoff group. Mild-to-medium Dominican profiles with excellent value.

blurb.hr: Cuvée Grand — prestige linija DomRey / Michael Chiusano (Cusano); Cuvée linija lansirana 2006. (Cigar Aficionado).
blurb.en: Cuvée Grand — DomRey / Michael Chiusano (Cusano) prestige line; Cuvée line launched in 2006 (Cigar Aficionado).

blurb.hr: Dalay Zigarren osnovao je Salih Dalay 1998.; njemački uvoznik i distributer s vlastitim linijama proizvedenim u Dominikanskoj Republici i Nikaragvi.
blurb.en: Dalay Zigarren was established by Salih Dalay in 1998; a German importer-distributor with own lines made in the Dominican Republic and Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Daniel Marshall Red Label — cigare DM od 1997. (CA debut rujan 1997.); Nicaraguan puro; humidori od 1982.
blurb.en: Daniel Marshall Red Label — DM cigars from 1997 (CA debut Sept 1997); Nicaraguan puro; humidors since 1982.

blurb.hr: Dapper Cigar Co. Iana Reitha (Kalifornija) — boutique od 2013.; prva Cubo Claro iz Estelíja (Nicaragua).
blurb.en: Dapper Cigar Co. of Ian Reith (California) — boutique since 2013; first Cubo Claro from Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Zino Davidoff postavio je standard luksuza; danas dominikanske i nikaragvanske linije slove za najprecizniju izradu na svijetu — od blage Signature do snažne Nicaragua i scotch-cask Late Hour.
blurb.en: Zino Davidoff set the luxury standard; today's Dominican and Nicaraguan lines are renowned for the world's most precise construction — from the mild Signature to the bold Nicaragua and scotch-cask Late Hour.

blurb.hr: Dominican Big Leaguer (DBL) Francisca Almontea; Tabacalera DBL, Tamboril — Amarillo, El Final i dr.
blurb.en: Dominican Big Leaguer (DBL) by Francisco Almonte; Tabacalera DBL, Tamboril — Amarillo, El Final, and others.

blurb.hr: De Leon Cigars manufakturu 2001. osnovali su Ruth De Leon Sosa i Sylvio Buchschatz u Dominikanskoj Republici; mala boutique proizvodnja.
blurb.en: De Leon Cigars’ manufactory was founded in 2001 by Ruth De Leon Sosa and Sylvio Buchschatz in the Dominican Republic; a small boutique operation.

blurb.hr: Debonaire House — Phil Zanghi i Daniel Sinclair, 2012.; ultra-premium DR (De Los Reyes), kasnije i Indian Motorcycle Cigars.
blurb.en: Debonaire House — Phil Zanghi and Daniel Sinclair, 2012; ultra-premium DR (De Los Reyes), later also Indian Motorcycle Cigars.

blurb.hr: Despot Cigars — braća Jovan i Uglješa Despot (Srbija); Series J iz Estelíja od 2019.
blurb.en: Despot Cigars — brothers Jovan and Uglješa Despot (Serbia); Series J from Estelí since 2019.

blurb.hr: Diamond Crown Classic Stanford Newman i Carlos Fuente Jr. stvorili su 1995. za 100. obljetnicu J.C. Newman Cigar Co.; dominikanske Fuente cigare, ranije povijesna Newmanova marka.
blurb.en: Stanford Newman and Carlos Fuente Jr. created Diamond Crown Classic in 1995 for J.C. Newman’s centennial; Dominican Fuente-made cigars reviving an earlier Newman marque.

blurb.hr: Dictador Cigars — Jason Nelson × Abe Flores (DR) uz kolumbijski rum Dictador; J. Nelson 1974 i ostale linije, IPCPR 2015.
blurb.en: Dictador Cigars — Jason Nelson × Abe Flores (DR) with Colombian Dictador rum; J. Nelson 1974 and other lines, IPCPR 2015.

blurb.hr: Diesel je 2009. lansiran kao suradnja A.J. Fernandeza i Cigars International; bold nikaragvanske linije, kasnije i u General Cigar / STG portfelju.
blurb.en: Diesel launched in 2009 as an A.J. Fernandez / Cigars International collaboration; bold Nicaraguan lines, later also in the General Cigar / STG portfolio.

blurb.hr: Dios del Sol El Principio — prva in-house linija Kopp Tobaccosa (Honduras) od 2025.; blagi CT/Broadleaf blend.
blurb.en: Dios del Sol El Principio — first in-house line of Kopp Tobaccos (Honduras) from 2025; mild CT/Broadleaf blend.

blurb.hr: Domaine de Lavalette — Cigarworld Hausmarke (bundle long/mediumfiller, DR); Classic serija u asortimanu od 17. 12. 2002.
blurb.en: Domaine de Lavalette — Cigarworld house brand (bundle long/medium-fillers, DR); Classic series in assortment since 17 Dec 2002.

blurb.hr: Mala švicarska manufaktura u Punta Cani (Michaela Ströml); hand-made Dominikanska Republika od 2001.
blurb.en: Small Swiss-managed manufactory in Punta Cana (Michaela Ströml); Dominican hand-mades since 2001.

blurb.hr: Dominican Estates — José Seijas / Tabacalera de García (La Romana); value longfiller u asortimanu od rujna 2005.
blurb.en: Dominican Estates — José Seijas / Tabacalera de García (La Romana); value long-filler in assortment from September 2005.

blurb.hr: Dominico Bundles — Villigerova dominikanska value linija; serija Bundles u katalogu od 7. 12. 2010. (ne miješati s Domenico / Punta Cana).
blurb.en: Dominico Bundles — Villiger Dominican value line; Bundles series catalogued from 7 Dec 2010 (distinct from Domenico / Punta Cana).

blurb.hr: Dominus MMXX — prva vlastita linija Traumfabrik München; Costa Rica produkcija (travanj 2020.).
blurb.en: Dominus MMXX — first in-house line from Traumfabrik Munich; Costa Rican production (April 2020).

blurb.hr: Menéndez/García — Canary Islands 1964. nakon embarga; od 1982. Dominikanska Republika (Altadis).
blurb.en: Menéndez/García — Canary Islands 1964 after the embargo; Dominican Republic from 1982 (Altadis).

blurb.hr: Don Duarte — Dr. Roger Duarte-Rodríguez (Estelí dinastija); brand 2008. (Evelio Oviedo blend), od 2019. Cigar Conexion.
blurb.en: Don Duarte — Dr. Roger Duarte-Rodríguez (Estelí dynasty); brand 2008 (Evelio Oviedo blend), Cigar Conexion from 2019.

blurb.hr: Don Fidel El Legado — marka Justoa Rica (Barcelona); proizvodnja u Tabacaleri Fidel Olivas, Estelí. Serija El Legado uvedena 10. 3. 2022. (Cigarworld).
blurb.en: Don Fidel El Legado — brand of Justo Rico (Barcelona); made at Fidel Olivas Tabacalera, Estelí. El Legado line introduced 10 Mar 2022 (Cigarworld).

blurb.hr: Don José Correa — premium linija Colpurosa (Piedecuesta, Santander), tvrtka osnovana 5. 8. 2009. (Yorgan Correa).
blurb.en: Don José Correa — premium line of Colpuros (Piedecuesta, Santander), company founded 5 Aug 2009 (Yorgan Correa).

blurb.hr: Don Julio — De Los Reyes (DR) tribute Julio Samuelu Reyes Fermínu; Punta Espada prikazan 2013., shipping od IPCPR 2014.; Sang Bleu proširenje 2024.
blurb.en: Don Julio — De Los Reyes (DR) tribute to Julio Samuel Reyes Fermín; Punta Espada shown 2013, shipping from IPCPR 2014; Sang Bleu expansion 2024.

blurb.hr: Don Kiki — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Don Kiki — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Don Lino je 1989. pokrenuo Nestor Miranda (Miami Cigar & Co.); prvo u Hondurasu preko UST-a, kasnije dominikanske linije u portfelju Mirandine kuće.
blurb.en: Don Lino was launched in 1989 by Nestor Miranda (Miami Cigar & Co.); first made in Honduras via UST, later Dominican lines in the Miranda portfolio.

blurb.hr: Don Lino (Miami Cigar & Co., Nestor Miranda) od 1989.; Fumas — value linija franšize.
blurb.en: Don Lino (Miami Cigar & Co., Nestor Miranda) since 1989; Fumas is the franchise value line.

blurb.hr: Don Melo — linija Philipa Wynnea / Felipe Gregoria (kuća osnovana 1990.); Centenario spomenut u CA intervjuu oko ranog boom-a 1990-ih; točna godina linije nije jednoznačno potvrđena (današnji katalog često DR value).
blurb.en: Don Melo — Philip Wynne / Felipe Gregorio line (house founded 1990); Centenario noted in CA interview around the early-1990s boom; exact line year not unambiguously confirmed (today’s catalogue often DR value).

blurb.hr: Don Pepín García marku pokrenuo je José „Pepin“ García 2003. uz tvornicu El Rey de los Habanos u Miamiju; kasnije My Father Cigars u Estelíju.
blurb.en: Don Pepín García launched his namesake brand in 2003 with El Rey de los Habanos in Miami; later expanded as My Father Cigars in Estelí.

blurb.hr: Don Pépin García eponimnu marku pokrenuo je José García 2003. u Miamiju (El Rey de los Habanos); proizvodnja i u Nikaragvi pod My Father Cigars.
blurb.en: Don Pépin García’s eponymous brand began in 2003 in Miami (El Rey de los Habanos); also made in Nicaragua under My Father Cigars.

blurb.hr: Don Rubio — Holt's/katalog value linija; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Don Rubio — Holt's/catalogue value line; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: Don Stefano Zigarrenmanufaktur GmbH osnovao je Steffen Rinn 17. prosinca 1993. u Heuchelheimu (Njemačka); njemačka manufaktura cigara i cigarillosa.
blurb.en: Don Stefano Zigarrenmanufaktur GmbH was founded by Steffen Rinn on 17 December 1993 in Heuchelheim, Germany; a German cigar and cigarillo manufactory.

blurb.hr: Honduraška marka iz Danlíja, danas u portfelju Scandinavian Tobacco Groupa. Poznata po pristupačnim, zanatski rađenim cigarama srednjeg tijela — Clásico linija važi kao jedan od najboljih omjera cijene i kvalitete u premium segmentu.
blurb.en: A Honduran brand from Danlí, today part of Scandinavian Tobacco Group. Known for affordable, well-made medium-bodied cigars — the Clásico line is regarded as one of the best values in the premium segment.

blurb.hr: Don Zuarin in-house je marka trgovca Steffena Brinkmanna (Schwerin); prva linija razvijena 2022. s Kurtom Brandtom u Nikaragvi.
blurb.en: Don Zuarin is Steffen Brinkmann’s (Schwerin) house brand; the first line was developed in 2022 with Kurt Brandt in Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Dona Flor — Menendez Amerino (Bahia) od 1977.; brazilski Mata Fina/Mata Norte purosi.
blurb.en: Dona Flor — Menendez Amerino (Bahia) since 1977; Brazilian Mata Fina/Mata Norte puros.

blurb.hr: Dos Amigos 87 — nikaragvanska marka Jordija Llorensa i Isidrea Pinede; predstavljena na InterTabacu 2025. (vinil-estetika; Paster/Sidecar).
blurb.en: Dos Amigos 87 — Nicaraguan marque by Jordi Llorens and Isidre Pineda; introduced at InterTabac 2025 (vinyl aesthetic; Paster/Sidecar).

blurb.hr: Dos Jotas — dominikanska boutique marka Juana Ernesta Jiméneza Oliviera (Tamboril/Santiago); službeno predstavljena 8. 11. 2018.; blendovi s Chicom Rivasom (Prime, Infinity).
blurb.en: Dos Jotas — Dominican boutique marque of Juan Ernesto Jiménez Olivier (Tamboril/Santiago); official launch 8 Nov 2018; blends with Chico Rivas (Prime, Infinity).

blurb.hr: Dos Santos S.A.U. — kanarska obiteljska tvrtka (Las Palmas); tvornica La Regenta osnovana 1921.; cigare od 1940-ih (Condal, Consul, La Regenta 1921).
blurb.en: Dos Santos S.A.U. — Canarian family firm (Las Palmas); La Regenta factory founded 1921; cigars from the 1940s (Condal, Consul, La Regenta 1921).

blurb.hr: Inovatori (Liga Privada, Undercrown, Acid) — Liga Privada No.9 je kultni tamni broadleaf gusta, uljasta dima.
blurb.en: Innovators (Liga Privada, Undercrown, Acid) — Liga Privada No.9 is the cult dark broadleaf of dense, oily smoke.

blurb.hr: Steve Saka (bivši šef Drew Estatea) — Sobremesa i Mi Querida su remek-djela balansa i tamne slatkoće.
blurb.en: Steve Saka (ex-Drew Estate CEO) — Sobremesa and Mi Querida are masterpieces of balance and dark sweetness.

blurb.hr: Ernesto Perez-Carrillo, majstor iza La Glorije Cubane; Pledge je bio Cigara godine 2020 — tamna slatkoća broadleafa.
blurb.en: Ernesto Perez-Carrillo, the master behind La Gloria Cubana; Pledge was Cigar of the Year 2020 — dark broadleaf sweetness.

blurb.hr: Christian Eiroa (obitelj koja je osnovala Camacho) — CBT maduro i 20 Years serije, honduraška dubina.
blurb.en: Christian Eiroa (the family that founded Camacho) — CBT maduro and 20 Years lines, Honduran depth.

blurb.hr: El Baton — originalna J.C. Newman nickel marka iz 1914.; Nicaraguan relaunch 2008. (prvi Nicaraguan puro kompanije), refresh 2022.
blurb.en: El Baton — original J.C. Newman nickel brand from 1914; Nicaraguan relaunch 2008 (company’s first Nicaraguan puro), refreshed 2022.

blurb.hr: El Centurion — My Father regular production od 2013. (10. obljetnica Don Pepína); originalni LE 2007. u Miamiju.
blurb.en: El Centurion — My Father regular production from 2013 (Don Pepín 10th anniversary); original LE 2007 in Miami.

blurb.hr: El Copey — dominikanske ručno rađene cigare vezane uz Emiliana Lagosa (distribucija / Tabacalera American Caribbean); na DE tržištu kasnije od njegovih nikaragvanskih linija; točna godina osnutka nije pouzdano dokumentirana.
blurb.en: El Copey — Dominican handmade cigars linked to Emiliano Lagos (distribution / Tabacalera American Caribbean); on the DE market later than his Nicaraguan lines; exact founding year not reliably documented.

blurb.hr: El Credito Cigar Co. — Ernesto Pérez-Carrillo Sr., Little Havana (Miami) od 1968.; kolijevka La Glorie Cubane prije prodaje Swedish Matchu.
blurb.en: El Credito Cigar Co. — Ernesto Pérez-Carrillo Sr., Little Havana (Miami) from 1968; birthplace of La Gloria Cubana before the Swedish Match sale.

blurb.hr: El Galan Cigars — Felix Mesa (Estelí), marka od 2013. u čast djeda; Maduro serija u EU od 2017.
blurb.en: El Galan Cigars — Felix Mesa (Estelí), brand from 2013 honouring his grandfather; Maduro series in EU from 2017.

blurb.hr: El Gaucho — premium linija PT Besuki Raya Cigar (Indonezija); Fantastico/Premium od 2022.
blurb.en: El Gaucho — premium line of PT Besuki Raya Cigar (Indonesia); Fantastico/Premium from 2022.

blurb.hr: El Güegüense (The Wise Man) — inauguralna marka Foundation Cigar Co. Nicholasa Melilla; IPCPR/shipping 2015., TABSA.
blurb.en: El Güegüense (The Wise Man) — inaugural brand of Nicholas Melillo’s Foundation Cigar Co.; IPCPR/shipping 2015, TABSA.

blurb.hr: Artesano del Tobacco braće Fakih, izrađen u fabrici AJ Fernandeza (San Lotano, Ocotal). San Andrés maduro wrapper preko odležanog nikaragvanskog duhana; Belicoso je #10 Cigara godine 2023. (Cigar Aficionado).
blurb.en: Artesano del Tobacco by the Fakih brothers, rolled at AJ Fernandez's San Lotano factory in Ocotal. San Andrés maduro over aged Nicaraguan tobacco; the Belicoso was Cigar Aficionado's #10 Cigar of 2023.

blurb.hr: El Rey del Mundo — cubanska marka osnovana 1848. (Ohmstedt); nekubanska/Honduras proizvodnja Villazon & Co. (danas Forged/STG; Oscuro itd.).
blurb.en: El Rey del Mundo — Cuban marque founded 1848 (Ohmstedt); non-Cuban/Honduras production by Villazon & Co. (now Forged/STG; Oscuro etc.).

blurb.hr: El Rico Habano — prva linija Ernesta Pérez-Carrilla Sr. u El Credito (Miami) 1970.; prekid mid-1990s, reintro 2001. (Jr.); Habano Maduro/Suprema u katalogu.
blurb.en: El Rico Habano — first line of Ernesto Pérez-Carrillo Sr. at El Credito (Miami) in 1970; mid-1990s pause, 2001 reintro (Jr.); Habano Maduro/Suprema in catalogue.

blurb.hr: El Septimo je 2005. pokrenuo francuski distributer Gilles Botquin; luksuzne cigare iz Kostarike (Pure Aroma), od 2019. u vlasništvu Younan Collection.
blurb.en: El Septimo was started in 2005 by French distributor Gilles Botquin; luxury Costa Rican cigars (Pure Aroma), owned by Younan Collection since 2019.

blurb.hr: El Sitio — Finca Tabaquera El Sitio (La Palma, Kanari); Antonio González García; puro od lokalnog tabaka; finca/eksperiment od 2005.
blurb.en: El Sitio — Finca Tabaquera El Sitio (La Palma, Canaries); Antonio González García; puro from local tobacco; farm/experiment from 2005.

blurb.hr: El Titán de Bronze — boutique fabrika Sandy Cobas (Miami / Little Havana) od 1995.; Redemption house linija (General Cigar distribucija 2024.).
blurb.en: El Titán de Bronze — Sandy Cobas boutique factory (Miami / Little Havana) from 1995; Redemption house line (General Cigar distribution 2024).

blurb.hr: El Viejo Continente debitirao je 2016. (IPCPR) kao marka Daniela Guerrera / Tabacoste; nikaragvanska boutique proizvodnja, kasnije s vlastitom tvornicom u Condegi.
blurb.en: El Viejo Continente debuted in 2016 (IPCPR) as Daniel Guerrero’s / Tabacosta brand; Nicaraguan boutique production, later with its own factory in Condega.

blurb.hr: El Vinyet — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: El Vinyet — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Vlastita linija legendarnog master blendera Davidoffa — čovjeka koji je desetljećima potpisivao njihove najcjenjenije blendove. Dominikanska preciznost i dubina u samostalnom izdanju.
blurb.en: The personal line of Davidoff's legendary master blender — the man behind their most celebrated blends for decades. Dominican precision and depth, now under his own name.

blurb.hr: Epic Cigars službeno je osnovao i zaštitio Dean Parsons 2010.; dominikanske handmade cigare nakon godina suradnje s blenderom Rolandom Villamilom.
blurb.en: Epic Cigars was officially founded and trademarked by Dean Parsons in 2010; Dominican handmade cigars after years working with blender Rolando Villamil.

blurb.hr: Escarabin — DR longfiller Bernharda A. Wernika (vlastita manufaktura kod Santiaga); serija u katalogu od 1. 7. 2009.
blurb.en: Escarabin — DR long-filler of Bernhard A. Wernik (own factory near Santiago); series catalogued from 1 Jul 2009.

blurb.hr: Esteban Carreras marka osnovana je 1996.; danas pod Craigom Cunninghamom s tvornicom Tabacalera Carreras u Estelíju (Nikaragva).
blurb.en: The Esteban Carreras brand was founded in 1996; today under Craig Cunningham with Tabacalera Carreras in Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Excalibur — Hoyo de Monterrey (nekubanski / General Cigar, Honduras); marka navršila 40 godina 2021. (Excalibur Black).
blurb.en: Excalibur — Hoyo de Monterrey (non-Cuban / General Cigar, Honduras); brand marked 40 years in 2021 (Excalibur Black).

blurb.hr: Factory Overrun — maloprodajna kategorija viška/odbačenih lota raznih tvornica (npr. Cigarworld); nije datirana marka — kandidat za izbacivanje iz brands indeksa.
blurb.en: Factory Overrun — retail surplus/reject-lot category from various factories (e.g. Cigarworld); not a dated marque — candidate for exclusion from the brands index.

blurb.hr: Fausto — Tatuaje / Pete Johnson full-bodied linija (My Father) od 2011.; blend iz T110 / Thermonuclear; Avion i druge vitole.
blurb.en: Fausto — Tatuaje / Pete Johnson full-bodied line (My Father) from 2011; blend from T110 / Thermonuclear; Avion and other vitolas.

blurb.hr: Ferio Tego — Michael Herklots i Brendon Scott od 2021. (nasljednici Nat Sherman cigara); Summa prva regularna originalna linija 2023.
blurb.en: Ferio Tego — Michael Herklots and Brendon Scott from 2021 (stewards of former Nat Sherman cigars); Summa first original regular line 2023.

blurb.hr: Fine Catch — Holt's dominikanski value (Marlin / Maduro; ribolovna tema; CT ili maduro omot); točna godina nije dokumentirana.
blurb.en: Fine Catch — Holt's Dominican value (Marlin / Maduro; angler theme; CT or maduro wrapper); exact year not documented.

blurb.hr: Povijesna fabrika u Santa Rosi de Copán, danas u sastavu švicarskog Villigera. Blago-srednji honduraški profili tradicionalne izrade.
blurb.en: The historic factory in Santa Rosa de Copán, today part of Switzerland's Villiger. Mild-to-medium Honduran profiles of traditional make.

blurb.hr: Flor de D'Crossier — linija Pure Aroma Cigars (Isaias Santana Diaz, Miami; tvrtka 2006.); D'Crossier cigare u Kostariki; Selection 512/560.
blurb.en: Flor de D'Crossier — Pure Aroma Cigars line (Isaias Santana Diaz, Miami; company est. 2006); D'Crossier cigars made in Costa Rica; Selection 512/560.

blurb.hr: Flor de Jose — Holt's/katalog value; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Flor de Jose — Holt's/catalogue value; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: Flor de las Antillas My Father Cigarsa debitirao je 2012.; nikaragvanski puro koji je iste godine proglašen Cigar of the Year u Cigar Aficionadu.
blurb.en: My Father Cigars’ Flor de las Antillas debuted in 2012; a Nicaraguan puro named Cigar Aficionado’s Cigar of the Year the same year.

blurb.hr: Maya Selva — honduraška elegancija francuskog stila, mekana i medena.
blurb.en: Maya Selva — Honduran elegance in the French style, soft and honeyed.

blurb.hr: Flor del Sol — honduraški STG mediumfiller (puro); Robusto predstavljen 2017., Churchill 2018.
blurb.en: Flor del Sol — Honduran STG medium-filler (puro); Robusto introduced 2017, Churchill 2018.

blurb.hr: Flores y Rodriguez liniju PDR Cigarsa Abea Floresa i partnera Rodrígueza lansirao je 2012.; dominikanske boutique serije uključuju jubilarne izdanja.
blurb.en: Flores y Rodriguez, a PDR Cigars line by Abe Flores and the Rodríguez partners, launched in 2012; Dominican boutique series including anniversary editions.

blurb.hr: Blaga kubanska marka prepoznatljiva po svilenom papiru na svakoj cigari — cvjetna i diskretna.
blurb.en: A mild Cuban marca recognisable by the tissue paper on each cigar — floral and discreet.

blurb.hr: Nicholas Melillo, bivši 'duhanski nos' Drew Estatea; Tabernacle je tamna, moćna broadleaf snaga, Charter Oak vrhunski value Connecticut.
blurb.en: Nicholas Melillo, Drew Estate's former 'tobacco nose'; Tabernacle is dark, mighty broadleaf power, Charter Oak a top-value Connecticut.

blurb.hr: Four Kicks — inauguralna linija Crowned Heads (Jon Huber i suradnici, tvrtka veljača 2011.); shipping studeni 2011., Carrillo DR.
blurb.en: Four Kicks — inaugural line of Crowned Heads (Jon Huber et al., company February 2011); shipping November 2011, Carrillo DR.

blurb.hr: Fratello Cigars osnovao je Omar de Frias 2013. (IPCPR lansiranje); boutique marka bivšeg NASA analitičara s proizvodnjom u Nikaragvi i Dominikanskoj Republici.
blurb.en: Fratello Cigars was founded by Omar de Frias in 2013 (IPCPR launch); a boutique brand from a former NASA analyst, made in Nicaragua and the Dominican Republic.

blurb.hr: Freud Cigar Co. — Luis Torres i David Stadnyk (Agape Lifestyle); luxury DR marka najavljena/debitirana 2022. (SuperEgo).
blurb.en: Freud Cigar Co. — Luis Torres and David Stadnyk (Agape Lifestyle); luxury DR brand announced/debuted 2022 (SuperEgo).

blurb.hr: G. De Graaff — ime nizozemske manufakture Gustaf de Graaffa (1859.); katalogov mediumfiller je suvremena kostarikanska/DR linija (Small Batch Traders).
blurb.en: G. De Graaff — name of Gustaf de Graaff’s Dutch manufactory (1859); catalogue medium-filler is a modern Costa Rica/DR line (Small Batch Traders).

blurb.hr: Gaia — Holt's/katalog value; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Gaia — Holt's/catalogue value; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: German Engineered / Rauchvergnügen — Hamburg (Nickels/Mahler/Sadowski) od 2016.; kasnije rebrand GE Cigars.
blurb.en: German Engineered / Rauchvergnügen — Hamburg (Nickels/Mahler/Sadowski) since 2016; later rebranded GE Cigars.

blurb.hr: Linije označene G.H. (npr. Black Dahlia, Blue in Green) pripadaju Gran Habanu; marku su 2003. pokrenuli Guillermo i George Rico u Danlíju (Honduras).
blurb.en: G.H.-labelled lines (e.g. Black Dahlia, Blue in Green) belong to Gran Habano; Guillermo and George Rico launched the brand in 2003 in Danlí, Honduras.

blurb.hr: Gilbert de Montsalvat osnovao je švicarski uvoznik Raymondo Bernasconi 2008.; marka inspirirana književnim likom, s linijama Classic, Revolution i Anniversary.
blurb.en: Gilbert de Montsalvat was founded by Swiss importer Raymondo Bernasconi in 2008; named after a literary character, with Classic, Revolution and Anniversary lines.

blurb.hr: Gispert (ne-kubanski) — Altadis USA relaunch 2003. u La Flor de Copán (Honduras); kubansko podrijetlo 1940-ih.
blurb.en: Gispert (non-Cuban) — Altadis USA relaunch 2003 at La Flor de Copán (Honduras); Cuban origins in the 1940s.

blurb.hr: God of Fire — Prometheus (Keith Park) × Fuente; By Carlito / By Don Carlos od 2004. u Tabacalera A. Fuente.
blurb.en: God of Fire — Prometheus (Keith Park) × Fuente; By Carlito / By Don Carlos since 2004 at Tabacalera A. Fuente.

blurb.hr: God of Fire — Prometheus (Keith K. Park) × Fuente; prvi put 2004. u limited Prometheus humidorsima, By Carlito / By Don Carlos.
blurb.en: God of Fire — Prometheus (Keith K. Park) × Fuente; first introduced 2004 in limited Prometheus humidors, By Carlito / By Don Carlos.

blurb.hr: Gran Habano marku pokrenuli su Guillermo i George Rico 2003. u Danlíju (Honduras), nakon što su 1998. osnovali tvornicu G.R. Tabacaleras Unidas.
blurb.en: Gran Habano was launched by Guillermo and George Rico in 2003 in Danlí, Honduras, after they founded G.R. Tabacaleras Unidas in 1998.

blurb.hr: Gran Ligero — vlastita marka njemačkog uvoznika Paula Buggea (Villingen-Schwenningen); No. 3 serija uvedena 6. 10. 2011. (nikaragvanski ligero puro).
blurb.en: Gran Ligero — private marque of German importer Paul Bugge (Villingen-Schwenningen); No. 3 series introduced 6 Oct 2011 (Nicaraguan ligero puro).

blurb.hr: Graycliff Original — Graycliff Cigar Company (Nassau, Bahami) Garzaroli obitelji; proizvodnja od siječnja 1997.; Pirate/Presidente i srodne linije.
blurb.en: Graycliff Original — Graycliff Cigar Company (Nassau, Bahamas) of the Garzaroli family; production from January 1997; Pirate/Presidente and related lines.

blurb.hr: The Griffin’s nastao je 1984. kao club-blend Bernarda Grobeta za Griffin’s Club u Ženevi; od 1992. u portfelju Oettinger Davidoffa, proizvodnja u Dominikanskoj Republici.
blurb.en: The Griffin’s began in 1984 as Bernard Grobet’s club blend for the Griffin’s Club in Geneva; owned by Oettinger Davidoff since 1992 and made in the Dominican Republic.

blurb.hr: Guantanamera — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Guantanamera — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Brend Kaizada Hansotije poznat po raskošnim, limitiranim izdanjima i neobičnim pakiranjima. Široka paleta od blagih do punih blendova.
blurb.en: Kaizad Hansotia's brand, famous for lavish limited editions and extravagant packaging. A wide palette from mild to full blends.

blurb.hr: Guzman Clasico — dominikanske linije (Connecticut/Maduro) u EU asortimanu od rujna 2021.; ne miješati s restoranom Guzman y Gomez.
blurb.en: Guzman Clasico — Dominican lines (Connecticut/Maduro) in EU assortments from September 2021; not the Guzman y Gomez restaurant chain.

blurb.hr: Bankarska kuća koja je postala marka — profinjeni, kremasto-cedrasti profil kave s mlijekom. Half Corona je savršena 'kava cigara'.
blurb.en: A banking house turned marca — a refined, creamy café-au-lait cedar profile. The Half Corona is the perfect 'coffee cigar'.

blurb.hr: Handelsgold — Arnold André (Bünde); marka zaštićena 1935., tržišni debije 1946.; njemačka „Volkszigarre“ (katalog također Tropenschatz linije).
blurb.en: Handelsgold — Arnold André (Bünde); trademark 1935, market debut 1946; German “people’s cigar” (catalogue also carries Tropenschatz lines).

blurb.hr: Švicarska marka Daniela Schwizera / Schwizer Trade; nikaragvanski blendovi (Kurt Brandt), uvođeni 2020.
blurb.en: Swiss brand of Daniel Schwizer / Schwizer Trade; Nicaraguan blends (Kurt Brandt), introduced 2020.

blurb.hr: Hemmy’s — berlinska marka Hemmyja Garcije od 2008.; Dominikanska produkcija (Linea Secreta, bundles).
blurb.en: Hemmy’s — Berlin brand of Hemmy Garcia since 2008; Dominican production (Linea Secreta, bundles).

blurb.hr: Henk Maori pokrenuo je Heiko Poerz 2016. (prva Haka Edición Limitada) uz Didiera Houvenaghela i A.J. Fernandeza; nikaragvanski limited puirovi.
blurb.en: Henk Maori was launched by Heiko Poerz in 2016 (first Haka Edición Limitada) with Didier Houvenaghel and A.J. Fernandez; Nicaraguan limited puros.

blurb.hr: Henry Clay — kubansko podrijetlo 1840-ih (Julián Álvarez); ne-kubanska američka/Altadis produkcija od 1986. (Consolidated), danas Tabacalera de García, DR.
blurb.en: Henry Clay — Cuban origins in the 1840s (Julián Álvarez); non-Cuban U.S./Altadis production from 1986 (Consolidated), now Tabacalera de García, DR.

blurb.hr: Hernandez & Ruiz — panamski value longfiller; u DE od 13.9.2012. (Paul Bugge).
blurb.en: Hernandez & Ruiz — Panamanian value long-filler; in Germany from 13 Sep 2012 (Paul Bugge).

blurb.hr: Herr Lehmann (Lahr) — Gregor Grüb/Klaus Harisch 2014. preuzeli Oskar Lehmann manufakturu (od 1924.); Schwarzwald hand-rolls.
blurb.en: Herr Lehmann (Lahr) — Gregor Grüb/Klaus Harisch took over the Oskar Lehmann manufactory (from 1924) in 2014; Black Forest hand-rolls.

blurb.hr: Hiram & Solomon — masonska boutique marka Fouada Kashoutyja i Georgea Dakrata; Entered Apprentice i srodne linije.
blurb.en: Hiram & Solomon — Masonic boutique brand by Fouad Kashouty and George Dakrat; Entered Apprentice and related lines.

blurb.hr: Holt’s Cigar Company osnovana je 1898. u Philadelphiji; obitelj Levin vodi trgovinu i katalog, uz vlastite Holt’s linije i Ashton Distributors.
blurb.en: Holt’s Cigar Company was founded in 1898 in Philadelphia; the Levin family runs the retailer/catalog, with Holt’s house lines and Ashton Distributors.

blurb.hr: Horacio su 2008. osnovali Christophe Leroy, Fabien Gil i Sylvain Toaldo; prvo Kostarika, danas proizvodnja u Estelíju (Nikaragva).
blurb.en: Horacio was founded in 2008 by Christophe Leroy, Fabien Gil and Sylvain Toaldo; first Costa Rica, now produced in Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Marka iz Vuelta Abajo poznata po elegantnim, blagim i kremastim cigarama. Epicure serija je klasik za mirnija poslijepodneva.
blurb.en: A Vuelta Abajo marca known for elegant, mild, creamy cigars. The Epicure line is a classic for quieter afternoons.

blurb.hr: HR / Hirochi Robaina — nikaragvanske puroi (IPCPR 2014.); Black linija kasnije; Omar González-Alemán.
blurb.en: HR / Hirochi Robaina — Nicaraguan cigars (IPCPR 2014); Black line later; Omar González-Alemán.

blurb.hr: August Schuster private label (Bünde); Ibis Dominicana u asortimanu od 2005., kasnije Honduras/Nikaragva.
blurb.en: August Schuster private label (Bünde); Ibis Dominicana in assortment from 2005, later Honduras/Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Il Padrino — njemački boutique label (Don Michael, André Riehl i dr.); serija cigara uvedena 17. 2. 2021.; Luigi (Don Luigi) DR Robusto.
blurb.en: Il Padrino — German boutique label (Don Michael, André Riehl et al.); cigar series introduced 17 Feb 2021; Luigi (Don Luigi) DR Robusto.

blurb.hr: Dion Giolito — kubanski stil stare škole, rafinirane i aromatične boutique cigare (Epernay).
blurb.en: Dion Giolito — old-school Cuban style, refined aromatic boutique cigars (Epernay).

blurb.hr: Inca/Inka Secret Blend — Mitchell Orchant (C.Gars UK) 2012.; peruanski purosi Tabacalera del Oriente.
blurb.en: Inca/Inka Secret Blend — Mitchell Orchant (C.Gars UK) 2012; Peruvian puros at Tabacalera del Oriente.

blurb.hr: Indian Motorcycle Cigars — Debonaire House (Phil Zanghi) × Polaris licenca; Habano/Maduro debije IPCPR 2015.
blurb.en: Indian Motorcycle Cigars — Debonaire House (Phil Zanghi) × Polaris licence; Habano/Maduro debut IPCPR 2015.

blurb.hr: Isthmus Cigar Company — Kurt Brandt; preimenovanje i selidba Estelí (Plasencia) 2009.; Connecticut Añejo serija u EU od 2012.
blurb.en: Isthmus Cigar Company — Kurt Brandt; renamed and moved to Estelí (Plasencia) in 2009; Connecticut Añejo series in EU from 2012.

blurb.hr: Jaime García Reserva Especial debitirao je u prosincu 2009. kao događajni blend Jaimea Garcíe; zatim redovna produkcija My Father Cigarsa u Estelíju.
blurb.en: Jaime García Reserva Especial debuted in December 2009 as Jaime García’s event blend, then became regular production at My Father Cigars in Estelí.

blurb.hr: Jalopy — Holt's/katalog value; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Jalopy — Holt's/catalogue value; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: JAMM Cigar (Alagoinhas, Bahia) — CNPJ od 30.11.2020.; komercijalni start 2022. (José Antonio Martins Monteiro).
blurb.en: JAMM Cigar (Alagoinhas, Bahia) — company registered 30 Nov 2020; commercial start 2022 (José Antonio Martins Monteiro).

blurb.hr: Jas Sum Kral — boutique marka Ristea Ristevskog (Makedonija/USA), od 2015.; Red Knight i ostale linije u Nikaragvi (npr. NOA).
blurb.en: Jas Sum Kral — boutique brand of Riste Ristevski (Macedonia/USA), since 2015; Red Knight and other lines made in Nicaragua (e.g. NOA).

blurb.hr: J. Fuego — Jesus Fuego / Tabacos S.A. od 2006. (Natural/Gran Reserva); Origen linija od 2010.; katalog Origen Natural.
blurb.en: J. Fuego — Jesus Fuego / Tabacos S.A. from 2006 (Natural/Gran Reserva); Origen line from 2010; catalogue Origen Natural.

blurb.hr: Jfr — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Jfr — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Jose — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Jose — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Najpristupačniji pravi kubanci (kratki filer) — grublji ali pošten svakodnevni dim.
blurb.en: The most affordable real Cubans (short filler) — rougher but an honest daily smoke.

blurb.hr: Najstarija nikaragvanska tvornica — Antaño 1970 je definicija snage stare škole, papreno i zemljano.
blurb.en: Nicaragua's oldest factory — the Antaño 1970 defines old-school power, peppery and earthy.

blurb.hr: Mala marka s odanim krugom obožavatelja — zemljano-medena, srednje-punog tijela.
blurb.en: A small marca with a loyal following — earthy-honeyed, medium-full body.

blurb.hr: Juárez — Crowned Heads value linija (TacanicSA) od 2019.; Johnny Cash / Cocaine Blues tema; Bulldozer LE 2025.
blurb.en: Juárez — Crowned Heads value line (TacanicSA) from 2019; Johnny Cash / Cocaine Blues theme; Bulldozer LE 2025.

blurb.hr: K. — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: K. — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: K. Fire — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: K. Fire — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Kafie 1901 — Dr. Gaby Kafie (Honduras/USA) od 2013.; 1901 = dolazak obitelji u Honduras.
blurb.en: Kafie 1901 — Dr. Gaby Kafie (Honduras/USA) since 2013; 1901 marks the family’s arrival in Honduras.

blurb.hr: Talijanska luxury marka (Bologna); Gran Venezia linija uvedena 2017., produkcija Costa Rica.
blurb.en: Italian luxury brand (Bologna); Gran Venezia line introduced 2017, produced in Costa Rica.

blurb.hr: Karen Berger Cigars (prvobitno K by Karen Berger) predstavljen je 2016.; nikaragvanske linije nastavlja Karen Berger nakon smrti supruga Enriquea „Kikija“ Bergera.
blurb.en: Karen Berger Cigars (originally K by Karen Berger) launched in 2016; Nicaraguan lines continued by Karen Berger after Enrique “Kiki” Berger’s death.

blurb.hr: King's Court — Holt's Honduras closeout (Abbot belicoso); godina lansiranja nije dokumentirana.
blurb.en: King's Court — Holt's Honduras closeout (Abbot belicoso); launch year not documented.

blurb.hr: KINIX / P. Santos Cigars (Jurandi Santos & Philipp Noack, Bremen) od 2019.; honduranski hand-made.
blurb.en: KINIX / P. Santos Cigars (Jurandi Santos & Philipp Noack, Bremen) since 2019; Honduran hand-mades.

blurb.hr: Kristoff Cigars osnovao je Glen Case 2004.; dominikanska marka poznata je po pig-tail zatvorenom podnožju i individualnom testiranju vuče.
blurb.en: Kristoff Cigars was founded by Glen Case in 2004; the Dominican brand is known for pig-tailed closed feet and individual draw testing.

blurb.hr: La Antiguedad — My Father Cigars (José „Pepín“ i Jaime García); debije 2014. s originalnim kubanskim artworkom iz 1870-ih.
blurb.en: La Antiguedad — My Father Cigars (José “Pepín” and Jaime García); debuted 2014 with original 1870s Cuban artwork.

blurb.hr: Ashton Distributors revitalizirao je povijesnu kubansku marku La Aroma de Cuba 2002.; danas je miješa José „Pepin“ García u Estelíju (Nikaragva).
blurb.en: Ashton Distributors revived the historic Cuban marque La Aroma de Cuba in 2002; today it is blended by José “Pepin” García in Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: EU naziv za Ashtonovu La Aroma de Cuba (relans 2002.); Edición Especial kod My Father (Pepín García).
blurb.en: EU name for Ashton’s La Aroma de Cuba (2002 relaunch); Edición Especial at My Father (Pepín García).

blurb.hr: Najstarija dominikanska tvornica — uravnotežene, aromatične cigare (107, 1903, Preferidos).
blurb.en: The oldest Dominican factory — balanced, aromatic cigars (107, 1903, Preferidos).

blurb.hr: La Barba — Tony Bellatto i Craig Rossi (tvrtka 2010.); prva linija Red na tržištu 2013. (kasnije William Ventura DR).
blurb.en: La Barba — Tony Bellatto and Craig Rossi (company 2010); first Red line to market 2013 (later William Ventura DR).

blurb.hr: La Bavaria — Marcel Polzmacher (PTG od 2005.); bavarski puro predstavljen 2014.; Costa Rica tabaci u katalogu.
blurb.en: La Bavaria — Marcel Polzmacher (PTG from 2005); Bavarian puro introduced 2014; Costa Rica tobaccos in catalogue.

blurb.hr: La Capitana — Villiger revitalizacija stare kubanske marke; EU/Nicaragua linija u asortimanu od studenoga 2012. (kasnije revampi).
blurb.en: La Capitana — Villiger revival of an old Cuban marque; EU/Nicaragua line in assortment from November 2012 (later revamps).

blurb.hr: La Chaveta — Cigarworld in-house brend (Casa de Alegria / Ralf Westerwick, Estelí); White prva serija od 13.9.2025.
blurb.en: La Chaveta — Cigarworld in-house brand (Casa de Alegria / Ralf Westerwick, Estelí); White first series from 13 Sep 2025.

blurb.hr: La Coalición — Crowned Heads × Drew Estate kolaboracija; debut IPCPR 2019., shipping studeni 2019. (Broadleaf / Sumatra).
blurb.en: La Coalición — Crowned Heads × Drew Estate collaboration; debut IPCPR 2019, shipping Nov 2019 (Broadleaf / Sumatra).

blurb.hr: La Dueña — My Father tribute Janny Garcia; blend Jaime Garcia / Pete Johnson; unveiled IPCPR 2012. (Estelí).
blurb.en: La Dueña — My Father tribute to Janny Garcia; blended by Jaime Garcia / Pete Johnson; unveiled IPCPR 2012 (Estelí).

blurb.hr: La Estrella — STG premium value brend (Honduras); Polar linija od 2019., Solar ~2020.; filler Kolumbija/Nikaragva, binder Indonezija.
blurb.en: La Estrella — STG premium value brand (Honduras); Polar line from 2019, Solar ~2020; Colombian/Nicaraguan filler, Indonesian binder.

blurb.hr: La Familia (André Riehl / Vegas de Santiago / Casagranda) — serija uvedena 28. 2. 2012.; linija Vida Loca Companero.
blurb.en: La Familia (André Riehl / Vegas de Santiago / Casagranda) — series introduced 28 Feb 2012; includes Vida Loca Companero.

blurb.hr: La Flor de Montenegro Mixed-Filler — kostarikanska mediumfiller serija (Tabacos de Costa Rica / Casagranda), katalogirana 3. 12. 2025.
blurb.en: La Flor de Montenegro Mixed-Filler — Costa Rican medium-filler series (Tabacos de Costa Rica / Casagranda), catalogued 3 Dec 2025.

blurb.hr: Litto Gomez uzgaja vlastiti duhan u La Canela — dom najsnažnijih dominikanskih cigara. Andalusian Bull bila je Cigara godine 2016.
blurb.en: Litto Gomez grows his own tobacco in La Canela — home of the most powerful Dominican cigars. The Andalusian Bull was Cigar of the Year 2016.

blurb.hr: La Galana — Annette Meisl (Köln); Clasica serija u asortimanu od srpnja 2007., Honduran production uz roll-events u Njemačkoj.
blurb.en: La Galana — Annette Meisl (Cologne); Clasica series in assortment from July 2007, Honduran production plus roll events in Germany.

blurb.hr: Tradicionalna Tabacalera Palma — široka lepeza pouzdanih, aromatičnih cigara odlične vrijednosti.
blurb.en: Traditional Tabacalera Palma — a wide range of reliable, aromatic value cigars.

blurb.hr: Nekubanska La Gloria Cubana službeno je lansirana u SAD-u 1972. (Ernesto Perez-Carrillo Sr., El Credito); kasnije Dominikanska Republika i General Cigar (od 1999.).
blurb.en: The non-Cuban La Gloria Cubana was officially launched in the U.S. in 1972 by Ernesto Perez-Carrillo Sr. (El Credito); later Dominican production and General Cigar (from 1999).

blurb.hr: La Imperiosa — Crowned Heads regular production od 2015. (blend Las Calaveras EL 2014); My Father Estelí.
blurb.en: La Imperiosa — Crowned Heads regular production from 2015 (Las Calaveras EL 2014 blend); My Father Estelí.

blurb.hr: La Instructora — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: La Instructora — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Nicarao La Ley — Didier Houvenaghel / AJ Fernandez; EU uvod 10.9.2013.; ime po staroj kubanskoj marki.
blurb.en: Nicarao La Ley — Didier Houvenaghel / AJ Fernandez; EU intro 10 Sep 2013; named after an old Cuban marque.

blurb.hr: Villiger La Libertad — US launch 2010.; kasnije rebrand/blend update; proizvodnja Honduras pa Nikaragva.
blurb.en: Villiger La Libertad — U.S. launch 2010; later rebrand/blend updates; made in Honduras then Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: La Magdalena Classic — Don Stefano privatna linija kod PDR (Abe Flores); blagi mediumfiller; EU od 29.9.2017.
blurb.en: La Magdalena Classic — Don Stefano private line at PDR (Abe Flores); mild medium-filler; EU from 29 Sep 2017.

blurb.hr: La Palina — moderni revival Billa Paleya 2010. (original Samuel Paley / Congress Cigar 1896.); El Diario i ostale premium linije.
blurb.en: La Palina — Bill Paley’s modern revival 2010 (original Samuel Paley / Congress Cigar 1896); El Diario and other premium lines.

blurb.hr: La Perla Habana — moderni revival Sergio Cuevas i Doug Wood (~1997.); Black Pearl linija unutar grupe.
blurb.en: La Perla Habana — modern revival by Sergio Cuevas and Doug Wood (~1997); Black Pearl line within the group.

blurb.hr: La Rosa de Sandiego prva je vlastita marka American Caribbean Cigarsa, lansirana 2015. na IPCPR-u; nikaragvanska proizvodnja u Estelíju.
blurb.en: La Rosa de Sandiego was American Caribbean Cigars’ first own brand, launched at IPCPR 2015; made in Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: La Sirena — Arielle Ditkowich s Nestorom Mirandom / Miami Cigar (2009.); Original u My Fatheru, kasnije neovisno od 2014.
blurb.en: La Sirena — Arielle Ditkowich with Nestor Miranda / Miami Cigar (2009); Original at My Father, independently owned from 2014.

blurb.hr: Lampert Cigars osnovao je Dr. Stefan Lampert 2017. (Liechtenstein); boutique linije iz Nikaragve, Kostarike i Dominikanske Republike.
blurb.en: Lampert Cigars was founded by Dr. Stefan Lampert in 2017 (Liechtenstein); boutique lines made in Nicaragua, Costa Rica and the Dominican Republic.

blurb.hr: Laura Chavin marku osnovao je Helmut Bührle 1992. i nazvao je po kćeri; prve cigare predstavljene su 1998., proizvedene u Dominikanskoj Republici.
blurb.en: Laura Chavin was founded by Helmut Bührle in 1992 and named after his daughter; the first cigars debuted in 1998, made in the Dominican Republic.

blurb.hr: Le Cigar — brazilska revival marka Renata Madeira (Leite & Alves, Bahia); moderni portfolio od 2022., Maturado linija 2025.
blurb.en: Le Cigar — Brazilian revival brand of Renato Madeiro (Leite & Alves, Bahia); modern portfolio from 2022, Maturado line 2025.

blurb.hr: Leaf — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Leaf — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Legado Premium — nikaragvanska serija (American Caribbean Tobacco); na Cigarworld katalogu od 4. 2. 2021. (nije Don Fidel El Legado).
blurb.en: Legado Premium — Nicaraguan series (American Caribbean Tobacco); on Cigarworld catalogue from 4 Feb 2021 (distinct from Don Fidel El Legado).

blurb.hr: Leite & Alves — brazilska manufaktura (Niterói 1854., kasnije Bahia/Cachoeira); Arapiraca i Mata Fina purosi.
blurb.en: Leite & Alves — Brazilian manufactory (Niterói 1854, later Bahia/Cachoeira); Arapiraca and Mata Fina puros.

blurb.hr: León Jimenes marku lansirala je La Aurora 1987. u čast osnivača Eduarda i Herminija León Jimenesa; dominikanske Connecticut linije.
blurb.en: La Aurora launched the León Jimenes brand in 1987 in honour of founders Eduardo and Herminio León Jimenes; Dominican Connecticut-wrapped lines.

blurb.hr: Leonel Cigars na tržište su 2014. iznijeli Norbert i Daniel Höldke (Paul Bugge); njemačka boutique marka s proizvodnjom u Nikaragvi i Dominikanskoj Republici.
blurb.en: Leonel Cigars was launched in 2014 by Norbert and Daniel Höldke (Paul Bugge); a German boutique brand made in Nicaragua and the Dominican Republic.

blurb.hr: Les Privatiers — lounge private label iz Timmendorfer Stranda (Flaig); prva linija Luculle 2011., Gold/Silver kod Brun del Ré.
blurb.en: Les Privatiers — Timmendorfer Strand lounge private label (Flaig); first Luculle line 2011, Gold/Silver at Brun del Ré.

blurb.hr: Licenciados — Oscar Boruchin (Mike’s Cigars) × Manuel Quesada / MATASA; mild Connecticut DR od 1989.
blurb.en: Licenciados — Oscar Boruchin (Mike’s Cigars) × Manuel Quesada / MATASA; mild Connecticut DR from 1989.

blurb.hr: Loaisiga Cigars — Silvio Loaisiga i José Antonio Ortega, Estelí od 2021.; prva brand linija Infiel (tržište ~2023.).
blurb.en: Loaisiga Cigars — Silvio Loaisiga and José Antonio Ortega, Estelí from 2021; first brand line Infiel (market ~2023).

blurb.hr: Los Amigos — blaga Dominikanska linija u distribuciji Villigera (Churchill Tubo itd.); CT omot, indonezijski binder. Serija uvedena 11. 7. 2013. (Cigarworld).
blurb.en: Los Amigos — mild Dominican line distributed by Villiger (Churchill Tubo etc.); CT wrapper, Indonesian binder. Series introduced 11 Jul 2013 (Cigarworld).

blurb.hr: Luciano Cigars / Ace Prime vlastite marke pokrenuo je Luciano Meirelles 2019.; vertikalno integrirana proizvodnja u Estelíju (Nikaragva).
blurb.en: Luciano Cigars / Ace Prime launched its own brands in 2019 under Luciano Meirelles; vertically integrated production in Estelí, Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Lucky Dublin — Holt's/katalog value; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: Lucky Dublin — Holt's/catalogue value; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: Luminosa — Crowned Heads × Ernesto Pérez-Carrillo (La Alianza); Connecticut soft launch 2016. (FDA deadline), formalno 2017.
blurb.en: Luminosa — Crowned Heads × Ernesto Pérez-Carrillo (La Alianza); Connecticut soft launch 2016 (FDA deadline), formal 2017.

blurb.hr: JFR Lunatic — Casa Fernández / Aganorsa Leaf ekstenzija JFR (Just For Retailers) od 2014.; debeli ring gauges iz Estelíja.
blurb.en: JFR Lunatic — Casa Fernández / Aganorsa Leaf extension of JFR (Just For Retailers) from 2014; large ring gauges from Estelí.

blurb.hr: Najprodavaniji blagi brend u SAD-u — kremasta, ultra-glatka Café linija idealna za jutro i početnike.
blurb.en: The best-selling mild brand in the US — the creamy, ultra-smooth Café line, ideal for mornings and beginners.

blurb.hr: Maestranza — marka iz kataloga trgovina (HR/EU/USA).
blurb.en: Maestranza — a brand listed in retail shop catalogues (HR/EU/USA).

blurb.hr: Man O’ War nacionalno je uveden u SAD 2009.; nikaragvanska marka koju za Cigars International proizvodi A.J. Fernandez.
blurb.en: Man O’ War was introduced nationally in the U.S. in 2009; a Nicaraguan brand made by A.J. Fernandez for Cigars International.

blurb.hr: Manuel Alonso marka u katalozima veže se uz španjolsku duhansku tradiciju od 1867.; suvremene linije (npr. 1867) proizvode se u Nikaragvi.
blurb.en: Manuel Alonso is catalogued as a Spanish tobacco tradition dating to 1867; modern lines (e.g. 1867) are made in Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Maradona Tribute — American Caribbean / The Traveler nakon Diegove smrti 2020.; Classic/Limited u asortimanu od 2021.
blurb.en: Maradona Tribute — American Caribbean / The Traveler after Diego’s 2020 death; Classic/Limited in assortment from 2021.

blurb.hr: Marca Fina — europski puro-po-zemlji brend (Brazil/Honduras/DR…); Brazil serija u EU katalogu od 10.1.2012. (Kopp/Cigarworld).
blurb.en: Marca Fina — European country-puro brand (Brazil/Honduras/DR…); Brazil series in EU catalogues from 10 Jan 2012 (Kopp/Cigarworld).

blurb.hr: Maria Mancini — historijska bremenska marka (književno u Zauberbergu); August Schuster ju je 1998. oživio u Hondurasu.
blurb.en: Maria Mancini — historic Bremen brand (literary fame in The Magic Mountain); relaunched in Honduras by August Schuster in 1998.

blurb.hr: Mata Hari — prva marka Monsoon Cigar Company (Sonny Suciawan); Courtisane/Java Exotica iz Indonezije, EU asortiman od svibnja 2024.
blurb.en: Mata Hari — first brand of Monsoon Cigar Company (Sonny Suciawan); Courtisane/Java Exotica from Indonesia, EU assortment from May 2024.

blurb.hr: Matilde Cigars osnovao je José Seijas 2013. nakon karijere u Altadisu/Tabacalera de García; dominikanske cigare iz Tabacalera Palma.
blurb.en: Matilde Cigars was founded by José Seijas in 2013 after his career at Altadis/Tabacalera de García; Dominican cigars made at Tabacalera Palma.

blurb.hr: Suvremeni Meerapfel cigar brand (UberLuxury) najavio je Jeremiah Meerapfel oko 2021.; obitelj poznata po kamerunskom duhanu, linije Richard/Meir i Behind the Scenes.
blurb.en: The modern Meerapfel cigar brand (UberLuxury) was announced by Jeremiah Meerapfel around 2021; the family is known for Cameroon leaf, with Richard/Meir and Behind the Scenes lines.

blurb.hr: ERMURI Genuss private label (Detmold); Meine Longfiller Bundles u asortimanu od 2010.
blurb.en: ERMURI Genuss private label (Detmold); Meine Longfiller Bundles in assortment from 2010.

blurb.hr: Menelik — Foundation Cigar Co. / Nick Melillo; event-only od travnja 2017., limited retail od 2019. (TABSA).
blurb.en: Menelik — Foundation Cigar Co. / Nick Melillo; event-only from April 2017, limited retail from 2019 (TABSA).

blurb.hr: Mi Querida — Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust / Steve Saka; Broadleaf linija od 2016. (NACSA, Nikaragva); Muy Grande i srodne vitole.
blurb.en: Mi Querida — Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust / Steve Saka; Broadleaf line from 2016 (NACSA, Nicaragua); Muy Grande and related vitolas.

blurb.hr: Micallef — Al Micallef s Gomez Sanchez obitelji (Estelí) od 2016.; Reata linija nazvana po njegovim restoranima.
blurb.en: Micallef — Al Micallef with the Gomez Sanchez family (Estelí) from 2016; Reata line named after his restaurants.

blurb.hr: Mil Días — Crowned Heads × Tabacalera Pichardo; ~1000 dana razvoja, shipping od 2020. (Ecuador Habano).
blurb.en: Mil Días — Crowned Heads × Tabacalera Pichardo; ~1000 days of development, shipping from 2020 (Ecuador Habano).

blurb.hr: Najprodavanija kubanska marka na svijetu, nazvana po romanu Grof Monte Cristo koji se čitao radnicima u tvornici. Klasičan profil kakaa, kave i cedra srednjeg tijela — mjerilo za habanose.
blurb.en: The world's best-selling Cuban marca, named after The Count of Monte Cristo read aloud to factory rollers. A classic medium-bodied profile of cocoa, coffee and cedar — the habano benchmark.

blurb.hr: Ne-kubanska Montecristo linija (Altadis) za američko tržište — dominikanska i nikaragvanska izdanja, glađa i blaža od kubanske.
blurb.en: The non-Cuban Montecristo line (Altadis) for the US market — Dominican and Nicaraguan editions, smoother and milder than the Cuban.

blurb.hr: Montes Bros osnovali su braća Israel i Iván Montes 2014. u Barceloni; španjolski distributer s vlastitim serijama cigara.
blurb.en: Montes Bros was founded by brothers Israel and Iván Montes in Barcelona in 2014; a Spanish distributor with its own cigar series.

blurb.hr: Fuente Montesino — jedna od prvih DR linija nakon otvaranja Tabacalera A. Fuente (~1980.).
blurb.en: Fuente Montesino — among the first DR lines after Tabacalera A. Fuente opened (~1980).

blurb.hr: Montosa — premium longfiller marka Arnold André Dominicana; lansirana 2019. (Connecticut/Maduro linije iz Santiago).
blurb.en: Montosa — premium long-filler brand of Arnold André Dominicana; launched 2019 (Connecticut/Maduro lines from Santiago).

blurb.hr: Mustique Blue — Eigenmarke Kopp Tobaccos; DR hand-rolled bundles od listopada 2008.
blurb.en: Mustique Blue — Kopp Tobaccos house brand; DR hand-rolled bundles from October 2008.

blurb.hr: Obitelj García (Don Pepín) — vlastiti duhan i vrhunska izrada. Le Bijou 1922 i Flor de las Antillas bili su Cigara godine.
blurb.en: The García family (Don Pepín) — own-grown tobacco and top construction. Le Bijou 1922 and Flor de las Antillas were both Cigar of the Year.

blurb.hr: Nat Sherman otvorio je eponimnu trgovinu u New Yorku 1930.; američka kuća poznata po premium cigarama i luksuznim cigaretama (kasnije Altria).
blurb.en: Nat Sherman opened his eponymous New York shop in 1930; an American house known for premium cigars and luxury cigarettes (later Altria).

blurb.hr: Nat Sherman Host Selection — CT Shade linija iz ranih 1990-ih (omiljena Natova; Hanover itd.); Maduro najavljen 2014. (Honduras, Jamastran); točna godina natural linije nije jednoznačno potvrđena.
blurb.en: Nat Sherman Host Selection — CT Shade line from the early 1990s (a Nat favorite; Hanover etc.); Maduro announced 2014 (Honduras, Jamastran); exact natural-line year not unambiguously confirmed.

blurb.hr: Nat Sherman Metropolitan Selection — Connecticut/Maduro od 1995. (Quesada); danas Ferio Tego Metropolitan (Host od 1994.).
blurb.en: Nat Sherman Metropolitan Selection — Connecticut/Maduro from 1995 (Quesada); now Ferio Tego Metropolitan (Host from 1994).

blurb.hr: Nat Sherman Timeless (Prestige) — nacionalni debije siječanj 2012. (Michael Herklots / Quesada); danas Ferio Tego Timeless Prestige.
blurb.en: Nat Sherman Timeless (Prestige) — national debut January 2012 (Michael Herklots / Quesada); now Ferio Tego Timeless Prestige.

blurb.hr: Nikaragvanski puroi Didiera Houvenaghela (DH Boutique); Clásico/Especiales nastali kad Nikaragva još nije bila mainstream.
blurb.en: Nicaraguan puros by Didier Houvenaghel (DH Boutique); Clásico/Especiales created when Nicaragua was still little-known in cigars.

blurb.hr: Nordlicht — community marka (Facebook grupa od 2014.); prva Toro Limitada / serija 2018. (Sascha Prieser × Kurt Brandt), Nicaragua puros.
blurb.en: Nordlicht — community brand (Facebook group from 2014); first Toro Limitada / series 2018 (Sascha Prieser × Kurt Brandt), Nicaragua puros.

blurb.hr: Notorious Cigars — Conor McGregor × MJ Frias (Santiago DR); premium debije 2025. (Toro / Double Robusto / Corona Gorda).
blurb.en: Notorious Cigars — Conor McGregor × MJ Frias (Santiago DR); premium debut 2025 (Toro / Double Robusto / Corona Gorda).

blurb.hr: Koncept Sama Leccije u Oliva fabrici: kratko i debelo, tako da odmah uđeš u 'sweet spot' cigare — punina okusa bez sat vremena pušenja.
blurb.en: Sam Leccia's concept at the Oliva factory: short and fat, dropping you straight into the cigar's sweet spot — full flavour without the hour-long commitment.

blurb.hr: O. Danny Boy — Holt's/katalog value; pouzdana godina osnutka nije pronađena.
blurb.en: O. Danny Boy — Holt's/catalogue value; reliable founding year not found.

blurb.hr: Holt’s ekskluziva u čast buldoga-maskote; blend José/Jaime Garcije, My Father Cigars, Estelí.
blurb.en: Holt’s exclusive named for the company’s bulldog mascot; blended by José/Jaime García at My Father Cigars, Estelí.

blurb.hr: Value legenda iz Nikaragve — od kremaste Serie G do nagrađivane, bogate Serie V Melanio. Iz iste fabrike u Estelíju dolazi i sestrinski brend Nub.
blurb.en: A Nicaraguan value legend — from the creamy Serie G to the awarded, rich Serie V Melanio. The sister brand Nub comes from the same Estelí factory.

blurb.hr: Olman / Tabacos de Costa Rica — Don Olman León, Puriscal (Costa Rica) od 1997.; Founders Edition 1997 nosi obiteljsko ime na banderoli.
blurb.en: Olman / Tabacos de Costa Rica — Don Olman León, Puriscal (Costa Rica) since 1997; Founders Edition 1997 carries the family name on the band.

blurb.hr: Olmec — Foundation Cigar Co. (Nicholas Melillo); PCA 2022 linija (Claro/Maduro San Andrés), AJ Fernandez Estelí.
blurb.en: Olmec — Foundation Cigar Co. (Nicholas Melillo); PCA 2022 line (Claro/Maduro San Andrés), AJ Fernandez Estelí.

blurb.hr: Omar Rodríguez Form — Fernando Navarro / Tabacalera Pichardo (Estelí); Form bundles u EU asortimanu od travnja 2023.
blurb.en: Omar Rodríguez Form — Fernando Navarro / Tabacalera Pichardo (Estelí); Form bundles in EU assortment from April 2023.

blurb.hr: Omar Ortez — Altadis U.S.A. value puro (Condega / Agrotabaco) lansiran 2006.; Originals, Maduro, Connecticut linije.
blurb.en: Omar Ortez — Altadis U.S.A. value puro (Condega / Agrotabaco) launched 2006; Originals, Maduro, Connecticut lines.

blurb.hr: Altadis USA / Consolidated maduro linija (Tabacalera de Garcia, DR); box-pressed Connecticut Broadleaf profil.
blurb.en: Altadis USA / Consolidated maduro line (Tabacalera de Garcia, DR); box-pressed Connecticut Broadleaf profile.

blurb.hr: Ortega Cigars (Eddie Ortega, nakon EO Brands) — debut Serie D 2012. u My Father Cigars, Estelí.
blurb.en: Ortega Cigars (Eddie Ortega, after EO Brands) — Serie D debuted in 2012 at My Father Cigars, Estelí.

blurb.hr: Honduraška boutique zvijezda — slatko-začinski, moderni i inovativni blendovi.
blurb.en: A Honduran boutique star — sweet-spicy, modern and innovative blends.

blurb.hr: OZ Family Cigars — Tim Ozgener od 2022. (Halfwheel New Company of the Year); Karatoba Sumatra linija 2025. (NACSA).
blurb.en: OZ Family Cigars — Tim Ozgener from 2022 (Halfwheel New Company of the Year); Karatoba Sumatra line 2025 (NACSA).

blurb.hr: Padilla Cigar Company osnovao je Ernesto Padilla u Miamiju 2003.; marka proizvodi premium cigare u čast obiteljske duhanske i književne baštine.
blurb.en: Padilla Cigar Company was founded by Ernesto Padilla in Miami in 2003; it makes premium cigars honouring the family’s tobacco and literary heritage.

blurb.hr: Obiteljska legenda — box-pressane nikaragvanske cigare besprijekorne izrade. Serije 1964 i 1926 su mjerilo za maduro s notama kakaa i espressa.
blurb.en: A family legend — box-pressed Nicaraguan cigars of flawless construction. The 1964 and 1926 series are the maduro benchmark, all cocoa and espresso.

blurb.hr: Palmar Arriba — dominikanska value/premium linija; u EU asortimanu od listopada 2005. (ime po DR distriktu).
blurb.en: Palmar Arriba — Dominican value/premium line; in EU assortment from October 2005 (named for a DR district).

blurb.hr: Artista Studio Works (Tabacalera El Artista, Tamboril) — petit corona u snopu od 8, umotana u „novine” s izmišljenim pričama iz fabrike. Pristupačan dnevni format, konkurent Cusanu i Don Tomasu.
blurb.en: Artista Studio Works (Tabacalera El Artista, Tamboril) — a petit corona in bundles of 8, wrapped in faux newspaper with tall tales from the factory. An affordable everyday format, rivalling Cusano and Don Tomas.

blurb.hr: Paradiso je europski naziv za Ashton/San Cristobal suradnju Levin–García; marka službeno lansirana 2007., proizvedena u Estelíju (My Father).
blurb.en: Paradiso is the European name for the Ashton/San Cristobal Levin–García collaboration; officially launched in 2007 and made in Estelí (My Father).

blurb.hr: Parcero — Arnold André Dominicana „friendship“ marka; Dominicano od ranog 2021., Brasil sljedeće godine.
blurb.en: Parcero — Arnold André Dominicana “friendship” brand; Dominicano from early 2021, Brasil the following year.

blurb.hr: Partageño y Cia uspješna je marka kuće August Schuster (Bünde) od 1906.; njemački cigarillosi i cigare od brazilskog, sumatranskog i karipskog duhana.
blurb.en: Partageño y Cia has been an August Schuster (Bünde) brand since 1906; German cigarillos and cigars using Brazilian, Sumatra and Caribbean tobaccos.

blurb.hr: Jedna od najstarijih kubanskih marki, poznata po punom, zemljano-paprenom tijelu. Serie D No.4 je definirala moderni robusto format.
blurb.en: One of Cuba's oldest marcas, famed for full, earthy-peppery body. The Serie D No.4 defined the modern robusto format.

blurb.hr: Patoro je 2001. osnovao Patrik Jonas Martin nakon rada u Davidoffu; švicarska marka s dominikanskom proizvodnjom (Augusto Reyes) i linijom Gran Añejo Reserva.
blurb.en: Patoro was founded in 2001 by Patrik Jonas Martin after his Davidoff tenure; a Swiss brand with Dominican production (Augusto Reyes) and the Gran Añejo Reserva line.

blurb.hr: PDR Cigars (Pinar del Río / Abe Flores) otvorio je vrata u Tamborilu 2004.; dominikanska boutique tvornica poznata po entubado uvijanju.
blurb.en: PDR Cigars (Pinar del Río / Abe Flores) opened in Tamboril in 2004; a Dominican boutique factory known for entubado bunching.

blurb.hr: Vertikalno integriran obiteljski brend; wrapperi odležani u bourbon bačvama daju karamelno-čokoladnu notu.
blurb.en: A vertically integrated family brand; bourbon-barrel-aged wrappers add a caramel-chocolate note.

blurb.hr: Perla de Calvano — ručno rađeni mediumfiller J. Cortès / VCF (Belgija), Estelí; u DE od ljeta 2015. (maloprodaja); točna godina osnutka brenda nije potvrđena drugim neovisnim izvorom.
blurb.en: Perla de Calvano — handmade medium-filler of J. Cortès / VCF (Belgium), Estelí; in DE from summer 2015 (retail); exact brand founding year not confirmed by a second independent source.

blurb.hr: Perla del Mar vuče korijene od 1905. (braća Perfecto García, Kuba/Ybor City); J.C. Newman renovirao je marku (lansiranje 2012., prerade kasnije) u Nikaragvi.
blurb.en: Perla del Mar traces to 1905 (Perfecto García brothers, Cuba/Ybor City); J.C. Newman revived the marque (2012 launch, later refinements) in Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Personales — Charles Fairmorn DR (ranije Particulares); mild longfilleri od 2003., Ligero Corojo od 2012.
blurb.en: Personales — Charles Fairmorn DR (formerly Particulares); mild long-fillers from 2003, Ligero Corojo from 2012.

blurb.hr: Peterson Hallmark — small-batch cigare irskog pipe makerа Peterson; u travel retailu barem od 2005. (uz Gran Reserva).
blurb.en: Peterson Hallmark — small-batch cigars from Irish pipe maker Peterson; in travel retail at least from 2005 (alongside Gran Reserva).

blurb.hr: Pichardo brand family dio je Ace Prime / Luciano Meirellesa; vlastite marke Ace Prime lansirane su 2019. uz tvornicu Tabacalera Pichardo u Estelíju.
blurb.en: The Pichardo brand family is part of Ace Prime / Luciano Meirelles; Ace Prime’s own brands launched in 2019 alongside Tabacalera Pichardo in Estelí.

blurb.hr: Vallejuelo Classic — Intercigar (Maurice A. Koks, Santiago DR); lansirano 2008. za švicarsko tržište kao pristupačna alternativa Habanosu.
blurb.en: Vallejuelo Classic — Intercigar (Maurice A. Koks, Santiago DR); released 2008 for the Swiss market as an affordable Habano alternative.

blurb.hr: Vedado — Justo Rico (Barcelona) × Fidel Oliva (Estelí); Black ~2022., Classic sestra u EU proljeće 2023.
blurb.en: Vedado — Justo Rico (Barcelona) × Fidel Oliva (Estelí); Black ~2022, Classic sister line in EU spring 2023.

blurb.hr: Najrasprostranjenija blaga cigara u Europi (dostupna i u HR) — kremasta i pristupačna.
blurb.en: The most widespread mild cigar in Europe (available in Croatia too) — creamy and approachable.

blurb.hr: Vegas de Santiago — costaricanska tabakalera (Puriscal/Santiago); prvi puroi 1997., kasnije međunarodna distribucija (Marc Niehaus).
blurb.en: Vegas de Santiago — Costa Rican factory (Puriscal/Santiago); first cigars in 1997, later international distribution (Marc Niehaus).

blurb.hr: Nazvana po legendarnom uzgajivaču duhana Alejandru Robaini — snažna, zemljana marka za iskusne.
blurb.en: Named after legendary tobacco grower Alejandro Robaina — a strong, earthy marca for the experienced.

blurb.hr: Victor Calvo — obiteljska produkcija od 1996. (Costa Rica, od 2001. Estelí); vlastito ime od 2013. (Cincuenta, Gold).
blurb.en: Victor Calvo — family production since 1996 (Costa Rica, Estelí from 2001); own-name brand from 2013 (Cincuenta, Gold).

blurb.hr: Villa Vieja — Fernando Navarro / Aganorsa (Estelí); market launch mid-2022.; Clasico linija u EU od 2023.
blurb.en: Villa Vieja — Fernando Navarro / Aganorsa (Estelí); market launch mid-2022; Clasico line in EU from 2023.

blurb.hr: Maya Selva 'veliki osnovni' — ručno rađena honduraška cigara po cijeni strojne. Sumatra wrapper, habano vezivo iz Jamastrana, srednje tijelo.
blurb.en: Maya Selva's 'great basic' — a handmade Honduran cigar at machine-made prices. Sumatra wrapper, Jamastran habano binder, medium body.

blurb.hr: Švicarska kuća sa stoljetnom tradicijom — pouzdane value cigare za europsko tržište.
blurb.en: A Swiss house with a century of tradition — reliable value cigars for the European market.

blurb.hr: Artesano del Tobacco (braća Fakih) iz fabrike AJ Fernandeza — bogati nikaragvanski blendovi upečatljivih prstenova; Connecticut verzija za blažu stranu.
blurb.en: Artesano del Tobacco (the Fakih brothers) from AJ Fernandez's factory — rich Nicaraguan blends with striking bands; the Connecticut version covers the milder side.

blurb.hr: Altadis USA — Omar Ortez blend (Ecuador Cubano wrapper); uvedeno 2010., Condega/Nikaragva.
blurb.en: Altadis USA — Omar Ortez blend (Ecuador Cubano wrapper); introduced 2010, Condega/Nicaragua.

blurb.hr: Kyle Gellis — povratak kubanskom stilu stare škole, svijetle i kremaste boutique cigare.
blurb.en: Kyle Gellis — a return to old-school Cuban style, bright and creamy boutique cigars.

blurb.hr: West Tampa Tobacco Co. (Rick Rodriguez / Gus Martinez) od 2022.; Black/White/Red i Circle of Life.
blurb.en: West Tampa Tobacco Co. (Rick Rodriguez / Gus Martinez) since 2022; Black/White/Red and Circle of Life.

blurb.hr: Foundation Cigar Co. debut El Güegüense / The Wise Man (Nick Melillo) 2015.; danas My Father produkcija.
blurb.en: Foundation Cigar Co. debut El Güegüense / The Wise Man (Nick Melillo) 2015; now made at My Father.

blurb.hr: Njemački proizvođač/uvoznik iz Bünde-Hüffena (Heinrich Woermann); kasnije Dominikanska produkcija i distribucija premium marki.
blurb.en: German maker/importer from Bünde-Hüffen (Heinrich Woermann); later Dominican production and distribution of premium brands.

blurb.hr: Wolfertz Aventura — honduraška serija (Raíces Cubanas), uvedena 21. 8. 2019.; ne miješati s ADVentura.
blurb.en: Wolfertz Aventura — Honduran series (Raíces Cubanas), introduced 21 Aug 2019; not to be confused with ADVentura.

blurb.hr: Xhaxhi Bobi — boutique marka Boba de Goedea (Nizozemac u DR; bivši proizvođač kutija); blendovi npr. u Kelner Boutique / El Artista; US vidljivost oko PCA 2022.; točna godina osnutka nije pouzdano dokumentirana.
blurb.en: Xhaxhi Bobi — boutique marque of Bob de Goede (Dutchman in the DR; former box maker); blends e.g. at Kelner Boutique / El Artista; US visibility around PCA 2022; exact founding year not reliably documented.

blurb.hr: Pristupačniji Davidoff brend — moderan nikaragvanski profil po razumnoj cijeni.
blurb.en: Davidoff's accessible brand — a modern Nicaraguan profile at a fair price.
